25.kj: or even, neither, no(-ne, -r), (can-) not, as nothing, without.

25.dv: (Aramaic) or מְטָה; (Aramaic), apparently corresponding to H4672 (מָצָא) in the intransitive sense of being found present;
(Aramaic) corresponding to H7171 (קֶרֶץ) in the sense of a bit (to 'eat the morsels of' any one, i.e.

26.gl: that, used as relative conjunction, and especially (with a preposition) in adverbial phrases; also as preposition of
26.kj: [idiom] as, but, for(-asmuch [phrase]), [phrase] now, of, seeing, than, that, therefore, until, [phrase] what (-soever), when, which, whom, whose.

26.gl: {properly, the whole; hence, all, any or every (in the singular only, but often in a plural sense)}
26.kj: all, any, + (forasmuch) as, + be-(for this) cause, every, + no (manner, -ne), + there (where) -fore, + though, what (where, who) -soever, (the) whole.

26.gl: {a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock}
{to grave, by implication, to write (describe, inscribe, prescribe, subscribe)}
{Darejavesh, a title (rather than name) of several Persian kings}

27.gl: to exist; used in a great variety of applications (especially in connection with other words)
27.kj: be, become, [phrase] behold, [phrase] came (to pass), [phrase] cease, [phrase] cleave, [phrase] consider, [phrase] do, [phrase] give, [phrase] have, [phrase] judge, [phrase] keep,

27.gl: that, used as relative conjunction, and especially (with a preposition) in adverbial phrases; also as preposition of
27.kj: [idiom] as, but, for(-asmuch [phrase]), [phrase] now, of, seeing, than, that, therefore, until, [phrase] what (-soever), when, which, whom, whose.

27.gl: {properly, the whole; hence, all, any or every (in the singular only, but often in a plural sense)}
27.kj: all, any, + (forasmuch) as, + be-(for this) cause, every, + no (manner, -ne), + there (where) -fore, + though, what (where, who) -soever, (the) whole.

27.gl: properly, flavor; figuratively, judgment (both subjective and objective); hence, account (both subjectively and objectively)
27.kj: [phrase] chancellor, [phrase] command, commandment, decree, [phrase] regard, taste, wisdom.
27.dv: (Aramaic) from H2939 (טְעַם), and equivalent to H2941 (טַעַם);

27.gl: {properly, a part of; hence (prepositionally), from or out of}
27.kj: according, after, [phrase] because, [phrase] before, by, for, from, [idiom] him, [idiom] more than, (out) of, part, since, [idiom] these, to, upon, [phrase] when.

27.gl: {he (she or it); self, or (especially with the article) the same; sometimes (as demonstrative) this or that; occasionally (instead of copula) as or are}

28.gl: that, used as relative conjunction, and especially (with a preposition) in adverbial phrases; also as preposition of
28.kj: [idiom] as, but, for(-asmuch [phrase]), [phrase] now, of, seeing, than, that, therefore, until, [phrase] what (-soever), when, which, whom, whose.

28.gl: {properly, a part of; hence (prepositionally), from or out of}
28.kj: according, after, [phrase] because, [phrase] before, by, for, from, [idiom] him, [idiom] more than, (out) of, part, since, [idiom] these, to, upon, [phrase] when.

28.gl: {the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve)}
to do, make, prepare, keep, etc.
28.kj: [idiom] cut, do, execute, go on, make, move, work.

28.gl: {a hand (the open one (indicating power, means, direction, etc.)}
